title: Interpret Tote Presence And Empty Rack State On the Container Selection Screen
summary: Use the Container Selection screen color coding to determine whether a location contains a tote or is an empty rack.
when_to_use: Use this reference when viewing the Container Selection screen and needing to determine whether a displayed rack or location currently shows a tote present or an empty rack state based on the documented blue color coding.
not_for: Do not use this runbook to interpret colors other than the documented dark blue and light blue states.
Do not infer additional location, alarm, or control meanings not documented in this source.

roles_and_responsibilities.responsibility: View the Container Selection screen and interpret the displayed rack or location color using the documented color meanings only.

safety_notes: Use only the documented color meanings from this source.
If the displayed color does not match the documented dark blue or light blue states, stop interpretation and escalate for clarification.
access_or_tools_needed: Access to the Container Selection screen
Visual access to the screen color indicators

access_required: Access to the Container Selection screen
system_preconditions: The Container Selection screen is visible.

visual_references.description: Container Selection screen frame showing the documented color-coded rack or location display and the dark blue/light blue meaning.

steps.title: Open or view the Container Selection screen
steps.purpose: Access the screen where the documented tote-presence and empty-rack color coding is shown.
steps.instruction: Open or view the Container Selection screen before interpreting any rack or location color state.
steps.expected_result: The Container Selection screen is visible for review.
steps.healthy_condition: The operator can see the Container Selection display with rack or location entries.
steps.failure_condition: The Container Selection screen is not available or the relevant display is not visible.

actions.label: View Container Selection screen
actions.exact_action: Open or view the Container Selection screen.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Container Selection screen showing the color-coded rack or location display.

stop_or_escalate_if: The Container Selection screen cannot be viewed.
The screen does not show the rack or location display needed for color interpretation.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: Training slide frame showing the Container Selection screen for locating and selecting totes, racks, or AGVs in the system.

steps.title: Locate the rack or location entries
steps.purpose: Identify the specific displayed entries whose color state will be interpreted.
steps.instruction: Locate the rack or location entries shown on the Container Selection screen.
steps.expected_result: The relevant rack or location entries are identified on the screen.
steps.healthy_condition: The operator can visually identify the displayed rack or location positions to inspect.
steps.failure_condition: The operator cannot determine which displayed entries are the rack or location positions to review.

actions.label: Identify displayed entries
actions.exact_action: Locate the rack or location entries shown on the screen.

stop_or_escalate_if: The displayed entries cannot be identified clearly enough to interpret their state.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: The frame shows a Container Selection screen or slide related to totes, containers, rack locations, and AGV location lookup.
OCR text: 'Dark blue indicates the presence of a tote. While light blue represents empty rack.'

steps.title: Observe the displayed color
steps.purpose: Determine which documented color state is being shown for the selected location or position.
steps.instruction: Observe the color of the displayed location or container position.
steps.expected_result: The operator identifies whether the displayed state is dark blue or light blue.
steps.healthy_condition: The displayed color is clearly visible and matches one of the documented blue states.
steps.failure_condition: The displayed color is unclear, ambiguous, or does not match the documented dark blue or light blue states.

actions.label: Inspect displayed color
actions.exact_action: Observe the color of the displayed location or container position.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: The blue color state shown for the displayed location or container position.

stop_or_escalate_if: The displayed color does not match the documented dark blue or light blue states.
The displayed color cannot be determined confidently.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: OCR text: 'Dark blue indicates the presence of a tote. While light blue represents empty rack.'

steps.title: Interpret dark blue as tote present
steps.purpose: Apply the documented meaning for the dark blue state.
steps.instruction: Interpret dark blue as indicating the presence of a tote.
steps.expected_result: A dark blue displayed location is understood to contain a tote.
steps.healthy_condition: Dark blue is used only to indicate tote presence, consistent with the source.
steps.failure_condition: Dark blue is interpreted as something other than tote presence.

actions.label: Apply dark blue meaning
actions.exact_action: Interpret dark blue as indicating the presence of a tote.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Dark blue location state on the Container Selection screen.

stop_or_escalate_if: The dark blue state appears to be used inconsistently with the documented meaning.
The operator is unsure whether the displayed color is dark blue.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: OCR text: 'Dark blue indicates the presence of a tote. While light blue represents empty rack.'

steps.title: Interpret light blue as empty rack
steps.purpose: Apply the documented meaning for the light blue state.
steps.instruction: Interpret light blue as representing an empty rack.
steps.expected_result: A light blue displayed location is understood to be an empty rack.
steps.healthy_condition: Light blue is used only to indicate an empty rack, consistent with the source.
steps.failure_condition: Light blue is interpreted as something other than an empty rack.

actions.label: Apply light blue meaning
actions.exact_action: Interpret light blue as representing an empty rack.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Light blue location state on the Container Selection screen.

stop_or_escalate_if: The light blue state appears to be used inconsistently with the documented meaning.
The operator is unsure whether the displayed color is light blue.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: OCR text: 'Dark blue indicates the presence of a tote. While light blue represents empty rack.'

steps.title: Record or communicate the observed state
steps.purpose: Ensure the observed state is shared using only the documented source meaning.
steps.instruction: Record or communicate the observed state using the documented color meaning only.

steps.healthy_condition: The communicated state matches the documented meaning of the observed color.
steps.failure_condition: The communicated state includes unsupported interpretation or undocumented color meaning.

actions.label: Communicate documented state
actions.exact_action: Record or communicate the observed state using the documented color meaning only.

stop_or_escalate_if: The displayed color does not match the documented dark blue or light blue states.
Additional interpretation beyond tote present or empty rack is being requested without source support.

success_criteria: The user can determine from the Container Selection screen whether a shown location has a tote present or is empty.
Dark blue is interpreted as tote present.
Light blue is interpreted as empty rack.
healthy_conditions: The Container Selection screen is visible.
The displayed location color is clearly dark blue or light blue.
The interpretation matches the documented source meaning only.
failure_conditions: The Container Selection screen is not available for viewing.
The displayed color is unclear or does not match the documented dark blue or light blue states.
An undocumented color or state is interpreted without source support.
escalation_guidance: Escalate or seek clarification if the displayed color does not match the documented dark blue or light blue states.
Do not infer meanings for colors or states not documented in this source.
